The village is home to many fine listed buildings including a 19th century schoolhouse, Grade I St. Andrew’s Church, Grade I Glemham Hall, and the flourishing local pub, The Lion Inn. The Suffolk Heritage coast, including Orford, Aldeburgh, and Thorpeness, is only a short twenty-minute drive.
